query:
INSERT INTO pipelineDeals (clientName, clientContact, clientEmail, dealName, serviceType, facility, company, stage, estimatedAnnualRevenue, estimatedPallets, probability, keyServices, notes, proposalDate, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('Spiked Ade (SPKED Inc)', 'Brad Moose', 'bmoose@spikedade.com', 'Spiked Ade - Warehousing & Distribution', 'warehousing', 'PA-1151 Bristol', 'L&M', 'proposal_sent', 384000, 2000, 50, '["Pallet Storage ($16/mo)","Handling In/Out ($10)","Shrink Wrap ($4/pallet)","Labeling ($0.50/label)","Case Pick ($0.40)","Order Processing ($10)"]', '12oz Sleek Can RTD 4.5% ABV | Producing in Southern VT & Buffalo NY | SOJO Bristol for cartoning | Pallet stack 2-3 high | $32K/mo storage minimum', NOW(), NOW(), NOW());
